control.description-key: Compact 3-field control for tracking flags (v1.0.4). Combines two Yes/No toggles (Monitor, High Priority) with a 3-value segmented picker (Access Permission). Designed to fit inside a 33% form column.

property.name: monitor
property.description-key: Bound Two-Option field for the Monitor flag

property.name: highPriority
property.description-key: Bound Two-Option field for the High Priority flag

property.name: accessPermission
property.description-key: Bound OptionSet field with three values: Standard (100000000), Limited (100000001), Restricted (100000002)

property.name: showTitle
property.description-key: Show the field caption labels (Monitor, High Priority, Access Permission) above each control. When hidden, the row moves up. Default: visible.

property.name: showVersion
property.description-key: Show the version badge in the bottom-right corner. Default: hidden.
